system.description: The Wireborn pushes an effect through the Wire Craft infrastructure in the area. All enemies within 40 feet that are interfacing with or benefiting from an active Wire Craft system — including active Signal cards, network-dependent enhancements, or linked equipment — take 4 + SIGNAL damage and receive Silence for 1 turn. Enemies with no Wire Craft dependency are unaffected. The Wireborn cannot use this card if they are currently under a Silence effect.
